jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - AIIMS - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
AIIMS, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About AIIMS:
AIIMS is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
